title: Microsoft's Copilot Shake-Up: New Leadership, New Prices, New Reality
author: Howard
description: Microsoft announces major Copilot reorganization under new EVP Jacob Andreou. Four-pillar structure, new SMB pricing at €21/user/month, role-based SKU retirements, and Office app restrictions coming April 2026.
excerpt: Redmond restructures its AI crown jewel under fresh leadership—with price hikes, SKU retirements, and a clear message: the free ride is ending.

keyFacts.newLeadership: Jacob Andreou appointed EVP reporting directly to Satya Nadella

timelines.event: Role-based SKUs retire (Sales Copilot, Service Copilot, Finance Copilot)

timelines.impact: Greater flexibility for partners and customers

timelines.event: Copilot reorganization announced under Jacob Andreou
timelines.impact: Four-pillar structure with direct Nadella reporting

timelines.event: Copilot in Office apps restricted to paid licenses only
timelines.impact: End of freemium AI features in Word, Excel, PowerPoint
Higher base platform costs plus AI licensing
